race.comment: ECLAIR VITALITY (2) is proving quite frustrating for supporters but looks destined to strike soon and looks to be well placed on the quick back-up. Intriguing change of tactics last start when sent forward, before fighting on bravely to just miss. Drawn well and is sure to be very competitive again. AZTEC DANCER (3) was a barnstorming winner in this grade earlier in the prep but found it a bit tough in town at the latest. Possesses a strong turn of foot on her day and if she is close enough at the turn, she will cause some headaches. CAPITALEX (1) returns and is a noted fresh performer having his first start for the Lukey team. Deserves to carry the top weight on his best form, so the 4kg claim gets him in well. Major threat if he's presented on song, though tough to assess without a public trial. Keeping safe. REINE OF NINE (5) also resumes and has run well fresh without winning. The form around her last campaign stacks up strongly for this first-up challenge. Don't underestimate.
